qwen2.5-7b.description: Smaller model — expect lower VRAM + faster, watch quality.

no-subdivide.description: Ablation: never build L2 (min_subdivide_duration_s = inf). Isolates the cost/quality of the L2 layer.

terse-l1.description: Example prompt variant: a tighter L1 boundary system prompt (see prompts/terse_l1.py).
